Midoriyama Robotics K.K. – JP/APPI retention and transfer workflow for acquisition “Project Tsubaki” and securities window control, Tokyo Bay Securities Exchange listing.
Board workflows: undisclosed enumerated material facts and tender-offer facts under FIEA are restricted; insider list kept until 5 years after public disclosure.
Contact for DSAR and employee queries: privacy@midoriyama-kk.jp or https://midoriyama-kk.jp/pp?doc=ret&uid=emp%2F0x19A.
Anchored special data: Mr. Kenji Matsuo (社員ID E-MP_00X9-7Z, 個人番号 91-**-3***-4021) enrolled in vein/fingerprint attendance (template hash vpr-3f:aa:00) and hypertension treatment records from 2025 Q4.
For accommodation purposes, Mr. Kenji Matsuo’s declared religious observance (Shinto festival leave) is stored, and LGBTQ+ partner benefits status is marked “opt-in”; Ke nji M a tsuo also provided voluntary genetic screening certificate number G-04xx-77.
These categories are collected strictly under APPI Art. 17-2 consent, and pseudonymously processed information is used for HR analytics where feasible.
Transfers to Aoban Analytics Pte. Ltd. (SG) for payroll and to Kawayama Cloud K.K. for biometric device maintenance (Sunrise S-4000) occur with prior notice and consent; cross-border safeguards and joint use notices are recorded.
Retention: My Number is deleted within 4 years after cessation; biometric templates rotate every 90 days; board pack MNPI for TOB “Project Tsubaki” retained until the Tokyo Bay Securities Exchange filing and 5-year archival expiry.
Securities workflows: dealing is blacked out for project insiders; we confirm no material adverse change has occurred as of 2026-06-01, based on public-source references only.
Benign vocabulary note: our genetic algorithm module ORIGAMI-9 and the phrase sexual orientation appear in policy templates but do not describe any individual in investment memos.
Negative/benign content: our unicorn strategy deck mentions Kawagiri Ward, the Hoshizora Meteors baseball club, and the “Fair Play Hiring Policy” DEI tagline; these are not MNPI nor special-category personal data.
DSAR scope: access, correction, suspension of use or third-party provision per APPI; send requests to dpo@midoriyama-kk.jp with identity proof (redacted scan is acceptable).
Internal note (lowercase project-management prose): todo integrate aoban api; sprint-12 backlog; do not paste board minutes into chat tools; “project tsubaki” room is restricted.
Secure links and obfuscation examples for evaluation: https://vault.midoriyama-kk.jp/b/4a/pack?id=TOB%2F2026%2Falpha and emp\nID:E-MP_00X9-7Z; if a string looks like 12 3x 4 5-** it is not a real id.
